task_description: Sprint 6: Task Mastery - Fix calendar card CSS bug, add recurring tasks, labels/tags, drag tasks to calendar, right-click context menu, bulk actions, auto-pilot AI mode, and template library.

verification.summary: All 5 features implemented and verified. Frontend build (npm run build) passes with all new pages (planner, tasks, calendar, settings, dashboard). ESLint shows no warnings or errors. Backend py_compile passes for main.py, autopilot.py, and templates.py. Test suite runs with --passWithNoTests (existing test uses react-markdown ESM which is a pre-existing Jest config issue, not related to our changes).
